name: @jsklan/devin-api-mcp
description: MCP server for the Devin API — create, manage, and interact with Devin sessions

scripts.version: node -e "const v=require('./package.json').version; for(const f of ['.claude-plugin/plugin.json','.claude-plugin/marketplace.json']){const j=require('./'+f);j.version?j.version=v:j.metadata&&(j.metadata.version=v);require('fs').writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(j,null,2)+'\n')}" && git add .claude-plugin/plugin.json .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
